scripts.build:pages: npm run build && npm run build:update
scripts.cap:sync: npm run build && npx cap sync android
scripts.android:debug: npm run cap:sync && powershell -NoProfile -Command ". .\scripts\setup-android-env.ps1; Set-Location android; .\gradlew.bat assembleDebug"
scripts.android:release: npm run cap:sync && powershell -NoProfile -Command ". .\scripts\setup-android-env.ps1; Set-Location android; .\gradlew.bat assembleRelease"
